sentences.english: I take the subway to work every day.
It takes about forty minutes from my house to the office.
The subway is very crowded during rush hour.
I usually listen to music or read a book on the train.
sentences.korean: 보통 전철에서 음악을 듣거나 책을 읽어요.

sentences.english: Sometimes I fall asleep and almost miss my stop.
sentences.korean: 가끔 잠이 들어서 거의 내릴 곳을 지나칠 뻔해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
